Request Intake & Classification.name: Request Intake & Classification
Request Intake & Classification.description: Classify the incoming interaction into ChemAssist, RegRadar, Supply Chain, proactive reorder, regulatory-change, or unsupported flow.

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for Request Intake & Classification; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

relevant_chunks.text_english: The platform combines ChemAssist, RegRadar, and the Supply Chain Agentic Spine into a governed intelligence layer for customer and internal workflows.

Identity & Account Scope Gate.name: Identity & Account Scope Gate
Identity & Account Scope Gate.description: Authenticate the user, resolve account context, and determine whether account-specific product, order, commercial, or supply-chain data may be used.

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for Identity & Account Scope Gate; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

relevant_chunks.text_english: ChemAssist must support account-specific answers only after authentication and authorization.
Customer data must be permissioned by account, user role, geography, and contractual rules.

Approved Source Retrieval.name: Approved Source Retrieval
Approved Source Retrieval.description: Retrieve only approved and current Dow product, technical, regulatory, formulation, account, and operations sources needed for the classified request.

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for Approved Source Retrieval; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

relevant_chunks.text_english: The platform must use approved Dow data sources and maintain source traceability for answers and agentic actions.
Customer-facing documents must be approved, current, and version-controlled; obsolete or superseded documents must not be used unless marked historical.

Customer Intent Branch.name: Customer Intent Branch
Customer Intent Branch.description: Route customer-facing interactions to product recommendation, formulation guidance, regulatory compliance, or proactive reorder processing.

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for Customer Intent Branch; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

relevant_chunks.text_english: ChemAssist covers product selection, formulation guidance, regulatory answers, order intelligence, multilingual support, and escalation.

Product Recommendation Analysis.name: Product Recommendation Analysis
Product Recommendation Analysis.description: Extract application requirements and rank candidate Dow products using approved product registry, TDS, SDS, application guides, formulation examples, and regulatory documents.

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for Product Recommendation Analysis; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

relevant_chunks.text_english: Product Selector must extract application requirements, match structured attributes, rank by fit, provide rationale and citations, and escalate where confidence is low.

Formulation Guidance Analysis.name: Formulation Guidance Analysis
Formulation Guidance Analysis.description: Answer formulation and usage questions only when grounded in approved technical content; route novel, undocumented, or safety-sensitive scenarios to Technical Service.

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for Formulation Guidance Analysis; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

relevant_chunks.text_english: Formulation Advisor must provide guidance only when grounded in approved content and escalate novel or undocumented scenarios.

RegRadar Compliance Check.name: RegRadar Compliance Check
RegRadar Compliance Check.description: Use RegRadar to retrieve current regulatory intelligence by product, jurisdiction, application, and regulation type; classify response as allowed, informational, sensitive, formal-certification, or restricted.

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for RegRadar Compliance Check; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

relevant_chunks.text_english: RegRadar maintains regulatory intelligence by product, jurisdiction, application, and regulation type, provides source date/version/status, and routes uncertain or legal-sensitive questions.

Supply Chain Availability & Risk Check.name: Supply Chain Availability & Risk Check
Supply Chain Availability & Risk Check.description: Query availability, regional supply risk, disruption status, customer commitments, and known constraints to make product or reorder guidance supply-aware.

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for Supply Chain Availability & Risk Check; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

transitions.action: Supply data unavailable; answer with caveat

relevant_chunks.text_english: Customer recommendations are incomplete unless availability, disruption risk, compliance, substitutes, reorder patterns, and policy constraints are understood.

Supply Chain Customer Guidance.name: Supply Chain Customer Guidance
Supply Chain Customer Guidance.description: Prepare customer-facing supply guidance, alternative recommendations, or internal service routing when product availability or disruption risk affects the answer.

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for Supply Chain Customer Guidance; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

transitions.action: Route to Sales or Customer Service

relevant_chunks.text_english: Customer-facing teams should receive proactive risk or alternative recommendations where appropriate after supply-chain disruptions.

Proactive Reorder Analysis.name: Proactive Reorder Analysis
Proactive Reorder Analysis.description: Analyze order history, account permissions, reorder timing, supply risk, commercial constraints, and potential alternatives before prompting a customer or Sales.

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for Proactive Reorder Analysis; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

relevant_chunks.text_english: ChemAssist validates account permissions, checks availability/risk, PAC checks commercial and customer-specific rules, and routes quote, reorder, or Sales workflow.

PAC Answer Policy Check.name: PAC Answer Policy Check
PAC Answer Policy Check.description: Call PAC before customer-facing answers or recommendations to verify grounding, source approval, disclaimers, authorization, regulatory boundaries, and answer/action level.

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for PAC Answer Policy Check; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

transitions.action: PAC simulation only; route to human

relevant_chunks.text_english: The platform must apply policy checks before committing automated or semi-automated action.
PAC returns allow, deny, or route-to-human decisions and records policy version, inputs, result, timestamp, and requesting agent.

Cited Response Generation.name: Cited Response Generation
Cited Response Generation.description: Generate a customer or internal answer with source citations, assumptions, caveats, confidence indicators, next actions, and policy decision references.

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for Cited Response Generation; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

relevant_chunks.text_english: ChemAssist must explain rationale using approved sources, provide citations, and not invent specifications, regulatory claims, availability, pricing, or commitments.
Customer-facing product, formulation, and regulatory answers must be grounded, cited, and refuse or escalate unsupported questions.

Next Action Routing.name: Next Action Routing
Next Action Routing.description: Route the user-selected or agent-recommended next action to sample, quote, reorder, Sales contact, Technical Service review, or closure.

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for Next Action Routing; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

relevant_chunks.text_english: After ChemAssist generates a cited response, the customer selects a next action and CRM, sample, quote, or case workflow is triggered.

PAC Controlled Action Check.name: PAC Controlled Action Check
PAC Controlled Action Check.description: Call PAC before any controlled recommendation, reorder, stock transfer, sourcing swap, system write, or automated/semi-automated action.

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for PAC Controlled Action Check; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

relevant_chunks.text_english: Supply-chain agents must call PAC before committing or recommending controlled actions and write only when authorization, policy, and human approval are satisfied.
PAC determines action level based on product, customer, jurisdiction, action type, risk, and policy version.

Action Level Determination.name: Action Level Determination
Action Level Determination.description: Determine whether the AI output is answer-only, recommendation-only, human-approved action, bounded auto-action, or prohibited.

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for Action Level Determination; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

relevant_chunks.text_english: The platform must use a tiered action model from Level 0 answer-only through Level 3 bounded auto-action, with Level 4 prohibited actions escalated or stopped.

System Workflow Trigger.name: System Workflow Trigger
System Workflow Trigger.description: Create the appropriate downstream workflow in CRM, case management, sample, quote, reorder, Sales, or customer service systems.

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for System Workflow Trigger; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

relevant_chunks.text_english: CRM, case management, ERP, order management, and notification integrations route escalations, orders, samples, quotes, and approved actions.

Human Escalation Router.name: Human Escalation Router
Human Escalation Router.description: Route low-confidence, high-risk, unsupported, ambiguous, out-of-policy, or human-required cases to the correct expert owner with full context and evidence.

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for Human Escalation Router; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

transitions.action: Route to Sales or Customer Service
Route to Planner, Finance, or Operations
Route knowledge gap to content owner

relevant_chunks.text_english: ChemAssist must escalate low-confidence, unsupported, high-risk, or novel questions to the appropriate human team.
The platform must support human review, approval, override, and escalation workflows.

Technical Service Escalation.name: Technical Service Escalation
Technical Service Escalation.description: Create a Technical Service case with full conversation history, account context, product references, documents retrieved, confidence, and suggested routing category.

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for Technical Service Escalation; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

Regulatory or Legal Escalation.name: Regulatory or Legal Escalation
Regulatory or Legal Escalation.description: Route uncertain, legally sensitive, formal-certification, or high-risk regulatory questions to Regulatory or Legal with source, jurisdiction, product, and customer context.

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for Regulatory or Legal Escalation; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

Customer Service or Sales Escalation.name: Customer Service or Sales Escalation

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for Customer Service or Sales Escalation; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

Customer Clarification Request.name: Customer Clarification Request
Customer Clarification Request.description: Ask the customer or internal user for missing application, jurisdiction, product, account, or action information required to continue safely.

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for Customer Clarification Request; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

Knowledge Gap Capture.name: Knowledge Gap Capture
Knowledge Gap Capture.description: Log missing, unsupported, obsolete, or low-quality source gaps and route them to product, regulatory, technical, or content owners for future remediation.

Human overrides should improve rules, prompts, content, and knowledge gaps.

Supply Chain Signal Assessment.name: Supply Chain Signal Assessment
Supply Chain Signal Assessment.description: Monitor approved ERP, MES, TMS, logistics, planning, and market feeds to detect signals that break planning assumptions.

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for Supply Chain Signal Assessment; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

relevant_chunks.text_english: The Anomaly Agent must monitor ERP, MES, TMS, logistics, and market feeds and create an alert when a signal breaks a planning assumption.
The Anomaly Agent detects abnormal feedstock, freight, logistics, plant status, demand, inventory, or market signals.

Supply Chain Agent Analysis.name: Supply Chain Agent Analysis
Supply Chain Agent Analysis.description: Coordinate Anomaly, Cost, Inventory, and Demand agents to recompute impact, model rebalancing, update risk, and prepare options.

control_attribute.description: Runtime decision value for Supply Chain Agent Analysis; used to unlock this state's outgoing transitions.

relevant_chunks.text_english: Initial agents include Anomaly, Inventory, Demand, and Cost agents, with Anomaly monitoring feeds, Inventory rebalancing, Demand scoring risk, and Cost recomputing cost-to-serve.
Supply-chain disruption flow runs Cost, Inventory, and Demand agents after Anomaly detection before PAC checks.

System of Record Write.name: System of Record Write
